_README: Onboard a client: edit the values below, then run `python3 generate.py` and deploy the dist/ folder. Only this file changes per client. Anything you leave out falls back to a sensible generic default (see generate.py).

reviews.author: Sarah M.
reviews.text: Fast, professional, and friendly — fixed our AC the same day we called. Highly recommend!

reviews.author: David R.
reviews.text: Honest pricing and great communication from start to finish. No upsell, just good work.

reviews.author: Lena P.
reviews.text: The technician explained everything clearly and left the place spotless. Five stars.

reviews.author: Marcus T.
reviews.text: Installed a whole new system in a single day. Works perfectly and runs so quietly.

reviews.author: Priya K.
reviews.text: Quick response on a hot day and a fair quote. We'll definitely use them again.

reviews.author: Tom B.
reviews.text: Signed up for the maintenance plan — our system runs better than ever. Great team.

copy_overrides._note: Optional. Add any {{TOKEN}} (lowercased) here to override its default copy, e.g. "hero_headline": "...".
copy_overrides.hero_headline: Reliable Heating & Air Conditioning You Can Count On
